evals.prompt: I need to install the whizard-monitoring extension. Please help me create the InstallPlan manifest to install version 1.2.1 with default configuration.
evals.expected_output: A valid InstallPlan YAML manifest that follows the skill requirements: metadata.name matches spec.extension.name, includes spec.extension.name and spec.extension.version fields, uses upgradeStrategy: Manual, and omits spec.config to use defaults.

assertions.name: metadata.name_matches_extension_name
assertions.description: InstallPlan metadata.name must exactly match spec.extension.name
assertions.check: The manifest should have metadata.name: whizard-monitoring and spec.extension.name: whizard-monitoring

assertions.name: extension_version_specified
assertions.description: spec.extension.version must be specified as 1.2.1
assertions.check: The manifest should have spec.extension.version: 1.2.1

assertions.name: upgrade_strategy_manual
assertions.description: upgradeStrategy should be Manual for production
assertions.check: The manifest should have upgradeStrategy: Manual

assertions.name: no_custom_config
assertions.description: spec.config should be omitted to use extension defaults
assertions.check: The manifest should NOT contain spec.config field

assertions.name: extension_enabled
assertions.description: Extension should be enabled
assertions.check: The manifest should have enabled: true

evals.prompt: I want to install the whizard-monitoring extension with custom configuration. The extension should be enabled and I need to set custom values: a=b. Create the InstallPlan manifest.
evals.expected_output: A valid InstallPlan YAML manifest with custom config that includes spec.config field with the custom configuration, enabled: true, upgradeStrategy: Manual, and follows all naming requirements.

assertions.name: metadata.name_matches_extension_name
assertions.description: InstallPlan metadata.name must exactly match spec.extension.name
assertions.check: The manifest should have metadata.name: whizard-monitoring and spec.extension.name: whizard-monitoring

assertions.name: custom_config_present
assertions.description: spec.config field should be present with custom configuration
assertions.check: The manifest should contain spec.config field with custom.a: b or similar

assertions.name: upgrade_strategy_manual
assertions.description: upgradeStrategy should be Manual for production
assertions.check: The manifest should have upgradeStrategy: Manual

assertions.name: extension_enabled
assertions.description: Extension should be enabled
assertions.check: The manifest should have enabled: true

evals.prompt: I need to deploy the whizard-monitoring extension across multiple clusters: host and member. Create an InstallPlan that deploys to both clusters with cluster-specific overrides for the host cluster (custom settings: a=c).
evals.expected_output: A valid InstallPlan YAML manifest with clusterScheduling configuration including placement.clusters list and cluster-specific overrides for the host cluster with custom configuration.

assertions.name: metadata.name_matches_extension_name
assertions.description: InstallPlan metadata.name must exactly match spec.extension.name
assertions.check: The manifest should have metadata.name: whizard-monitoring and spec.extension.name: whizard-monitoring

assertions.name: cluster_scheduling_present
assertions.description: spec.clusterScheduling field should be present for multi-cluster deployment
assertions.check: The manifest should contain spec.clusterScheduling field

assertions.name: placement_clusters_listed
assertions.description: placement.clusters should list both host and member
assertions.check: The manifest should have spec.clusterScheduling.placement.clusters: [host, member]

assertions.name: cluster_overrides_host
assertions.description: cluster-specific overrides should be present for host cluster
assertions.check: The manifest should have spec.clusterScheduling.overrides.host with custom.a: c

assertions.name: upgrade_strategy_manual
assertions.description: upgradeStrategy should be Manual for production
assertions.check: The manifest should have upgradeStrategy: Manual

evals.prompt: The whizard-monitoring extension is currently installed at version 1.2.1. I want to upgrade it to version 1.3.0. Create the InstallPlan manifest for this upgrade.
evals.expected_output: A valid InstallPlan YAML manifest for upgrading, with spec.extension.version set to 1.3.0, upgradeStrategy: Manual, enabled: true, and metadata.name matching spec.extension.name.

assertions.name: metadata.name_matches_extension_name
assertions.description: InstallPlan metadata.name must exactly match spec.extension.name
assertions.check: The manifest should have metadata.name: whizard-monitoring and spec.extension.name: whizard-monitoring

assertions.name: target_version_1_3_0
assertions.description: spec.extension.version should be 1.3.0 for upgrade
assertions.check: The manifest should have spec.extension.version: 1.3.0

assertions.name: upgrade_strategy_manual
assertions.description: upgradeStrategy should be Manual for production
assertions.check: The manifest should have upgradeStrategy: Manual

assertions.name: extension_enabled
assertions.description: Extension should remain enabled after upgrade
assertions.check: The manifest should have enabled: true

evals.prompt: The whizard-monitoring extension installation is stuck in the 'Installing' phase. Help me diagnose the issue by providing the necessary kubectl commands to check the InstallPlan status, extension controller logs, and failed pods.
evals.expected_output: A set of kubectl commands to diagnose installation issues: kubectl describe installplan, kubectl logs for extension-controller, kubectl get pods for errors, and checking conditions messages.

assertions.name: check_installplan_status
assertions.description: Provides kubectl describe command for InstallPlan status
assertions.check: Should include 'kubectl describe installplan whizard-monitoring' or similar

assertions.name: check_extension_controller_logs
assertions.description: Provides kubectl logs command for extension controller
assertions.check: Should include 'kubectl logs -n kubesphere-system -l app=extension-controller' or similar

assertions.name: check_failed_pods
assertions.description: Provides command to check for failed pods
assertions.check: Should include 'kubectl get pods -n kubesphere-system | grep Error' or similar

assertions.name: check_conditions
assertions.description: Provides command to check InstallPlan conditions
assertions.check: Should include command to inspect status.conditions or conditions messages
